positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene viewed through a crystal portal. The main subject is a group of glowing, anthropomorphic forest creatures (foxes, deer, owls) gathered around a crystalline pool that reflects a neon-lit aurora borealis. The style is ethereal vaporwave meets sacred geometry, using bold, clean silhouettes and intricate linework. Composition must be centralized and balanced, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, magenta, and glowing gold accents. Strong dramatic backlighting emphasizing the silhouettes and crystalline reflections. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, sketch, grainy, low resolution, bad anatomy, ugly, deformed, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, artifacts, extra limbs, noisy, oversaturated
